caption: A group of students in light-colored button-down shirts and yellow vests gather around a white table in a classroom setting. In the initial sequence, several students stand closely together, focusing their attention on handheld tablets. One student rests a hand on the table while others hold and interact with the devices. The scene then shifts to close-up views of the tablets' screens. One screen displays a French text titled "Une vie d'éléphant" followed by a passage beginning with "faufilait aisément en faisant de grands sourires aux animaux. Les lui rendaient en disant que". Another screen shows a blue interface titled "Countries of the World" with menu options including "Etudier", "Test", and "Rechercher". The transition moves from a wide shot of the collaborative student group to detailed views of the educational software they are using.
